content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Hot Mama
description: Hot Mama is an Effervescent Jakobs sniper rifle from the Fight for Sanctuary DLC in Borderlands 2. When scoped, it becomes perfectly accurate, making it a strong pick for Gaige builds with high Anarchy where normal accuracy suffers.

special.title: Sniper is a lonely occupation.
special.description: Always Incendiary. Fires bullets that leave a heart trail. Aiming down sights sets accuracy to 100%. Critical hits or critical kills grant a stack that increases critical hit damage by 50%. Stacks have no cap, but each lasts 12 seconds and you can only gain one stack every 5 seconds. Has unique voice lines while equipped.

notes: It only rolls with a Maliwan scope, a Dahl grip and the bladed accessory. Its critical bonus can only add a new stack once every 5 seconds. Each stack lasts 12 seconds and expires on its own timer.
